race.comment: SCOOTATHEWOOTA (5) made a good impression first-up here when only warming late to grab third. Is sure to have come on from that and draws the A1. Won't get too many better chances to get off the mark than this. KARMA QUEEN (7) has mixed her form this prep but turned in one of her better efforts last time when second. Strips rock-hard fit and only needs to hold her form to be fighting out the finish. SHE'S ICONNIC (12) was no match for an impressive debut winner at headquarters two weeks ago but still did a good job to finish second. Better for that and deserves consideration. MY CHERIE AMOR (9) was much better second-up when sent forward and was only gunned down late. Fitter again and is drawn kinder. Should give a sight. SETTLE PETAL (10) was disappointing first-up but should improve. Watch for her doing her best work late.
